mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role != 'ADMIN') AS total_members, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetings WHERE deletedAt IS NULL) AS total_meetings, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING') AS pending_reports, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sports) AS total_sports

SELECT u.userId, u.loginId, u.nickname, u.profileImage, CASE WHEN r.regionId IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', r.dong) END AS regionName, u.role, u.status, u.suspendedUntil FROM users u LEFT JOIN regions r ON u.regionId = r.regionId ORDER BY u.userId DESC
SELECT regionId, sido, sigungu, dong FROM regions ORDER BY sido ASC, sigungu ASC, dong ASC

SELECT m.meetingId, m.title, s.name AS sportName, s.category AS sportCategory, CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', r.dong) AS regionName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingParticipants mp WHERE mp.meetingId = m.meetingId AND mp.status = 'APPROVED' ) + CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM meetingParticipants hostMp WHERE hostMp.meetingId = m.meetingId AND hostMp.userId = m.hostUserId AND hostMp.status = 'APPROVED' ) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS approvedCount, m.maxMembers, m.status, u.nickname AS hostNickname, m.meetingDate, m.startTime, m.createdAt FROM meetings m JOIN users u ON m.hostUserId = u.userId JOIN sports s ON m.sportId = s.sportId JOIN regions r ON m.regionId = r.regionId WHERE m.deletedAt IS NULL ORDER BY m.meetingId DESC

SELECT r.reportId, r.reason, r.content AS content, r.content AS reportContent, r.content AS detail, r.status, r.createdAt, r.targetUserId, u.nickname AS targetName FROM reports r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.targetUserId = u.userId ORDER BY r.reportId DESC

SELECT m.meetingId AS meetingId, m.title AS meetingTitle, mp.userId AS userId FROM meetings m JOIN meetingParticipants mp ON mp.meetingId = m.meetingId AND mp.status = 'APPROVED' AND mp.userId != m.hostUserId WHERE m.hostUserId = #{userId} AND m.deletedAt IS NULL AND m.status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED')
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = #{status}, processedAt = NOW() WHERE reportId = #{reportId}

UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, suspendedUntil = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SUSPENDED' THEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) ELSE NULL END, suspendReason = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SUSPENDED' THEN suspendReason ELSE NULL END, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE userId = #{userId}
UPDATE meetings SET status = #{status}, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE meetingId = #{meetingId}
UPDATE users SET status = 'SUSPENDED', suspendedUntil = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{suspendDuration} HOUR), suspendReason = #{suspendReason}, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE userId = #{userId}
UPDATE meetings SET status = 'CANCELLED', deletedAt = COALESCE(deletedAt, NOW()), updatedAt = NOW() WHERE hostUserId = #{userId} AND deletedAt IS NULL AND status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED')

UPDATE meetingParticipants mp JOIN meetings m ON m.meetingId = mp.meetingId SET mp.status = 'CANCELLED', mp.cancelledAt = NOW() WHERE mp.userId = #{userId} AND mp.status IN ('PENDING', 'APPROVED') AND m.deletedAt IS NULL AND m.status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED')
